title: Reset Password
content: Users can reset their password from Settings > Security. Click 'Reset Password' and complete email verification.

title: Update Email
content: To update email address, go to Profile > Account Information and save the new email.

title: Delete Account
content: Accounts can be permanently deleted from Settings > Privacy. This action cannot be undone.

title: Subscription Plans
content: Users may upgrade or downgrade subscription plans from Billing > Plans.

title: Contact Support
content: Support is available via the Help Center or email support@company.com.
